I found an event that looks like your "Dental check-up":

Before I reschedule it to 2024-05-20 starting at 10:00 (I will keep the same 1-hour duration, so end at 2024-05-20 11:00) and notify both you and the clinic, please confirm two things:

1. Is this the correct event to reschedule? (title/ID above)  
2. What is the clinic's email address so I can add them to the event and ensure they receive the notification?

Once you confirm and provide the clinic email, I will add the clinic as a participant, reschedule the event, and notify both you and the clinic by email.
